title: Boiled One: Unleashed
description: Listen closely when you hear the trumpets. The Boiled One has arrived,
body:
The Boiled One: Unleashed mod adds a terrifying new entity called "The Boiled One" to the game. It appears shortly after a Broadcast Interference has happend, spawning somewhere nearby and watching you silently. The Boiled One is passive at first, but will become aggressive if you look directly at it. It doesn't chase while under direct eye contact, but don’t look away too long. Staring at it for too long may trigger the Boiled One Syndrome, a creeping condition that can eventually lead to the Locked-In Syndrome, which ends deadly. The Christian Bible is the only known item that offers protection against the Boiled One. 

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► How can I disable the Boiled One despawning?

You can disable the Boiled One despawning by changing the gamerule "boiledOneDespawn" to true. 
He won't despawn naturall.

► How can I disable the Broadcast Interferance?

You can disable the Broadcast Interferance by changing the gamerule "disableBroadcast" to true. The Broadcast Interferance won't happen if this gamerule is set to false, but the Boiled One can still spawn.

► Can I make the Boiled One Syndrom keep me paralyzed?

Yes! You can make the Boiled One Syndrom keep you paralyzed like in the actual lore of the Boiled One by changing the gamerule "keepBoiledOneSyndromLocked" to true. The Aggressive version of the Boiled One will still spawn, but only watch the player and despawns if a player without the syndrom is nearby.

► How can I enable the Boiled One to spawn?

You can enable the Boiled One to spawn directly by changing the gamerule "enableBoiledOneSpawn" to true. There is also an Item in creative mode you can use to enable the spawning.

► When does the Boiled One spawn?

The Boiled One only spawns after the Broadcast Interferance, which can happen during the day in the moon phases 1, 2, 3, 8 or 8, has happend. After that, he can spawn in the overworld or in the nether and always near the player. Sometimes you can hear a trumpet when he spawned.

► How does the Boiled One Syndrom work?

If you look at the Boiled One, there is a chance that you can get the effect called "Boiled One Syndrom".
This effect can be cleared by using milk or a christian bible and has 3 different stages.

Stage 1: Nothing happens. When you sleep, there is a chance that the Boiled One will spawn nearby and stalks you.
Stage 2: You receive slowness, weakness and mining fatique. Sometimes you hear a quiet trumpet from the boiled one. The Boiled One can also spawn nearby more often but will only stalk you.
Stage 3: You got the Lock In Syndrom and cannot move anylonger. The Boiled One will spawn next to you and will then kill you.

</details>



![Boiled One](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00ccee05434f2478170a951401f4a518579d9520_0.webp)

The Boiled One spawns after a Broadcast Interference event, appearing in both the Overworld and the Nether near the player. It is slow at first and simply watches. It has high health and deals heavy damage. If the player comes too close or looks directly at it, the Boiled One becomes aggressive, increasing its speed, even in water. However, if the player maintains eye contact from a distance of more than five blocks, it be unable to move. Looking at the Boiled One may trigger the Boiled One Syndrome. A stalking version of the Boiled One will appear nearby, even during sleep, vanishing immediately if looked at it. Over time, strange trumpet sounds and negative effects will appear as well. When the syndrome reaches its final stage called "The Locked-In Syndrome", the player becomes fully paralyzed, unable to move, as the Boiled One spawns close to them and eventually kills them.


 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
